name: BBQ Crab Sandwich
keywords: cheese main dish sandwiches seafood vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the muffins in a bowl.
2. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to blend.
3. Spread mixture onto halves of english muffins.
4. Broil until hot and cheese is melted.
5. Serve immediately.
